component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

attack_surface.data_description: Vote details (proposal ID, vote choice, weight)

behavior_details.name: Provide Liquidity
behavior_details.description: External User deposits tokens into a BEX liquidity pool.

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of strong authentication/identity verification for voting.

actor_risk.description: Standard external user interacting with the contract.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Impersonating a voter can manipulate governance outcomes.

assumptions: The governance contract relies solely on transaction sender address without additional identity verification.
Attacker can obtain legitimate user addresses.

mitigation.strategy: Require cryptographic signature for vote payloads linked to the authorized BGT holder.

description: An attacker spoofs the identity of a legitimate BGT holder to cast fraudulent votes on governance proposals.

component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

attack_surface.data_description: Vote details (proposal ID, vote choice, weight)

behavior_details.name: Provide Liquidity
behavior_details.description: External User deposits tokens into a BEX liquidity pool.

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data can be altered during transmission or processing without detection.

actor_risk.description: Standard external user interacting with the contract.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Tampering with votes corrupts the integrity of the governance process.

assumptions: The data flow between the user interface/wallet and the contract is not fully protected.
The governance contract does not verify the integrity of the received vote payload (e.g., via signature or hash check).

mitigation.strategy: Implement integrity checks on vote data, such as requiring a signature over the entire vote payload.

description: An attacker intercepts or modifies the content of a vote before it is processed by the governance contract.

component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

behavior_details.name: Provide Liquidity
behavior_details.description: External User deposits tokens into a BEX liquidity pool.

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Voting action is not securely logged or linked to the user's identity in an undeniable way.

actor_risk.description: Standard external user interacting with the contract.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Repudiation impacts auditability and accountability of governance participation.

assumptions: The governance contract or associated logging does not store sufficient cryptographic proof linking a vote action to the specific actor beyond the standard transaction sender.

mitigation.strategy: Ensure transaction signatures are provably linked to the actor's identity and securely log all voting actions with their transaction hashes.

description: An actor denies having cast a specific vote on a governance proposal.

component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

behavior_details.name: Provide Liquidity
behavior_details.description: External User deposits tokens into a BEX liquidity pool.

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Insufficient controls to prevent excessive or malicious vote submissions from overwhelming the contract or network.

actor_risk.description: Standard external user potentially leveraging multiple accounts or bots.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Disrupting the voting process prevents legitimate governance participation.

assumptions: The governance contract or network infrastructure lacks effective rate limiting or Sybil resistance.
Gas costs are not prohibitively high for an attacker to submit a large volume of transactions.
Input validation for votes is not sufficiently strict to quickly discard malicious payloads.

mitigation.strategy: Implement transaction rate limiting, enhance input validation, and potentially explore Sybil resistance mechanisms.

description: An attacker floods the governance contract with a high volume of vote submissions, potentially using invalid data or Sybil identities, to prevent legitimate votes from being processed or to disrupt contract availability.

component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

behavior_details.name: Provide Liquidity
behavior_details.description: External User deposits tokens into a BEX liquidity pool.

data_flow_details.description: Incentive tokens available for claiming by the user from the distributor.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Governance contract logic incorrectly calculates or enforces voting weight based on BGT holdings/delegation.

actor_risk.description: Standard external user seeking unauthorized voting power.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Voting with excess weight directly manipulates governance outcomes and undermines the BGT token's role.

assumptions: The governance contract has a vulnerability in how it reads or applies the user's BGT balance or delegated weight for voting.
An attacker can craft a vote transaction that exploits this vulnerability.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust, securely audited contract logic to accurately and strictly enforce voting weight based on the actor's BGT holdings/delegation at the time of the vote.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability to cast a vote with a higher voting weight than their actual BGT holdings or delegation allows.

component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

behavior_details.name: Mint HONEY
behavior_details.description: External User mints $HONEY using collateral assets on Honey Swap.

data_flow_details.description: dApp fees available for claiming by the user from the FeeCollector.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Insufficient controls to prevent excessive or overly complex proposal submissions that can degrade performance or halt the contract.

actor_risk.description: Standard external user potentially leveraging multiple accounts or bots.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Preventing proposal creation stalls governance progress and decision making.

assumptions: The governance contract or network infrastructure lacks effective rate limiting for proposal submissions.
The cost (gas/BGT threshold) is not a sufficient deterrent for an attacker.
Input validation doesn't prevent overly large or computationally expensive proposals.

mitigation.strategy: Implement transaction rate limiting, enforce strict limits on proposal size and complexity, and ensure the BGT threshold is checked efficiently.

description: An attacker floods the governance contract with a high volume of proposals or submits proposals designed to consume excessive resources, hindering legitimate users from creating proposals or disrupting contract functionality.

component_details.name: Honey Swap
component_details.description: Native dApp for trading assets for $HONEY and minting $HONEY.

behavior_details.name: Mint HONEY
behavior_details.description: External User mints $HONEY using collateral assets on Honey Swap.

data_flow_details.description: dApp fees available for claiming by the user from the FeeCollector.

boundary_details.name: Berachain Bridge to Berachain
boundary_details.description: Separates the external bridging service from the core blockchain network.

security_gap.gap_description: Governance contract logic incorrectly calculates or enforces the BGT threshold for proposal creation.

actor_risk.description: Standard external user seeking unauthorized proposal creation ability.

actor_details.name: External User
actor_details.description: General user interacting with the Berachain ecosystem.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Allowing proposal creation without meeting the threshold bypasses a fundamental governance access control.

assumptions: The governance contract has a vulnerability in how it checks the user's BGT balance or delegated weight against the proposal creation threshold (10,000 BGT).
An attacker can craft a transaction that exploits this vulnerability.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust, securely audited contract logic to accurately and strictly enforce the 10,000 BGT threshold for proposal creation.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability to create a governance proposal without holding or having delegated the required 10,000 BGT.
